patches.summary: Encoded eRank MCP code orchestration in the reprint spec.
patches.reason: The prior CLI carried custom MCP workflow tools; the reprint preserves the architectural pattern through generator-owned code orchestration instead of endpoint-mirror-only MCP.
patches.validated_outcome: shipcheck passes; scorecard MCP tool design and surface strategy both score 10/10.

patches.summary: Preserved cache freshness behavior through spec-owned cache configuration.
patches.reason: The prior CLI added stale-cache warnings for local eRank data. The reprint now declares cache freshness in the spec so generated auto-refresh and cache metadata are emitted consistently.

patches.summary: Kept structural verify independent of live browser-session credentials.
patches.reason: cli-printing-press verify runs in a temporary mock context; browser-session proof checks must validate command shape without requiring a real browser proof file.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./..., cli-printing-press verify --fix, and shipcheck pass.

patches.summary: Kept the first-class command for installing the bundled pp-erank skill.
patches.reason: Users should not need to remember the Printing Press installer invocation after the CLI is already installed.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passes; shipcheck verify-skill passes.

patches.summary: Tightened standalone polish readiness checks for eRank-specific commands.
patches.reason: Phase 5 live dogfood sampled a generated account command that accepted the Printing Press invalid placeholder, and gosec flagged the hand-authored drift history file path handling.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./..., live Phase 5 dogfood, and publish validate pass; gosec has no findings in hand-authored polish files.

patches.summary: Split eRank insight commands, added tests, removed a dead helper, and added keyword signal snapshot storage.
patches.reason: These are eRank-specific local quality improvements that improve maintainability and data-pipeline evidence without changing upstream Printing Press.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passes; cli-printing-press publish validate passes; local scorecard rows improve where local code quality is measurable.

patches.summary: Addressed PR review findings across generated CLI behavior, local sync/search semantics, and eRank keyword-difficulty input shape.
patches.reason: These local patches correct eRank-specific generated output and review-identified safety issues before upstream generator changes exist.
patches.validated_outcome: gofmt passed; go test ./... passed; keyword-difficulty dry-run preserved an explicit zero value; go run ./cmd/erank-pp-cli doctor --json and agent-context --pretty completed.

patches.summary: Rejected Printing Press invalid placeholders in the lists optimize list-name argument.
patches.reason: Publish-time live dogfood expects invalid argument probes to fail before the command performs eRank API work.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli -run TestNovelListsOptimize and go test ./... pass; publish live dogfood passes 205/205 tests.

patches.summary: Redacted customer PII from archived dogfood proof output.
patches.reason: Public library packaging blocks email and phone values in manuscripts and generated proof artifacts.
patches.validated_outcome: cli-printing-press publish package PII scan no longer reports these proof values.

patches.summary: Fixed public-library review findings in list filtering and shared keyword scoring.
patches.reason: Greptile review on the publish PR found list-name filtering, difficulty scoring, consensus counting, and title-casing defects in eRank-specific novel commands.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli -run 'Test(NovelListsOptimize|KeywordListID|FilterKeywordTermRows|ScoreKeyword|RankConsensusTags|BuildAngles)' and go test ./... pass.
